          simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, Fin2.last, TypeVec.repeatEq] at hfg ⊢
          exact ⟨f Fin2.fz x, g Fin2.fz x, hfg, rfl, rfl⟩
        | fs j =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Function.comp_apply]
          specialize hfg (Fin2.fs j) x
          simp only [TypeVec.RelLast] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim
      refine ⟨u, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => Coalg.toCofix { a with s }) ⊚ f
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun t => Coalg.toCofix { b with s := t }) ⊚ g
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, TypeVec.comp]
        convert hf using 2
        funext i x
        cases i <;> rfl
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, TypeVec.comp]
        convert hg using 2
        funext i x
        cases i <;> rfl
      · intro i j
        specialize hfg i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, Function.comp] at hfg ⊢
          cases (f Fin2.fz j) with
          | inl s' =>
            cases (g Fin2.fz j) with
            | inl t' => exact False.elim hfg
            | inr t' => exact ⟨s', t', hfg, rfl, rfl⟩
          | inr s' =>
            cases (g Fin2.fz j) with
            | inl t' => exact False.elim hfg
            | inr t' => exact False.elim hfg
        | fs i => exact hfg

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [← hf, MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp_assoc]
        congr 1
        ext i x
        cases i <;> rfl
      · simp only [← hg, MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp_assoc]
        congr 1
        ext i x
        cases i <;> rfl
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.IsLast, TypeVec.comp, Function.comp_apply, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin.cases_succ, Fin.cases_zero]
          specialize hfg Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, Fin.cases_succ, Fin.cases_zero, RelLast] at hfg
          obtain ⟨s', t', hR', hs', ht'⟩ := hfg
          cases hs'
          cases ht'
          exact ⟨s', t', hR', rfl, rfl⟩
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, Function.comp_apply, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin.cases_succ]
          specialize hfg (Fin2.fs i) j
          simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, Fin.cases_succ, RelLast] at hfg
          exact hfg

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [Coalg.union, ← hf, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        rfl
      · simp only [Coalg.union, ← hg, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        rfl
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.IsRelLast'_def, TypeVec.IsRelLast'_val]
          specialize hfg Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.IsRelLast'_def, TypeVec.IsRelLast'_val, TypeVec.IsRelLast_val, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun] at hfg ⊢
          cases (f Fin2.fz j) with
          | inl sl => exact ⟨sl, (g Fin2.fz j).getRight (by simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast', hfg]), hfg, rfl, rfl⟩
          | inr sr => simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast'] at hfg
        | fs i =>
          specialize hfg i.fs j
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.id] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have hbis := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at hbis
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hbis ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := hbis
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: (Cofix.corec a.dest')) ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: (Cofix.corec b.dest')) ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hf]
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hg]
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.IsRelLast] at hfg
          specialize hfg j
          simp only [TypeVec.IsRelLast, TypeVec.IsRelLast', TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun,
            Fin2.elim0, TypeVec.id]
          cases hfg.1 with
          | inl hl => exact ⟨hl.1, hl.2, hfg.2, rfl, rfl⟩
          | inr hr => exact ⟨hr.1, hr.2, hfg.2, rfl, rfl⟩
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.id]
          exact (hfg (Fin2.fs i) j).2

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have h_lift := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at h_lift
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_lift
      refine ⟨u, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => Coalg.toCofix { a with s }) ⊚ f
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun t => Coalg.toCofix { b with s := t }) ⊚ g
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc, hf]
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc, hg]
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at hfg ⊢
          specialize hfg Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at hfg
          cases (f Fin2.fz j) with
          | inl s' =>
            cases (g Fin2.fz j) with
            | inl t' => exact False.elim (hfg)
            | inr t' => exact ⟨s', t', hfg, rfl, rfl⟩
          | inr s' => exact False.elim (hfg)
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg (Fin2.fs i) j

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have h_bisim' := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at h_bisim'
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim' ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim'
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hf]
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hg]
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.IsLast, TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at hfg ⊢
          specialize hfg Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.IsLast, TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at hfg
          cases hf' : f Fin2.fz j <;> cases hg' : g Fin2.fz j <;> simp_all
          refine ⟨_, _, hfg, rfl, rfl⟩
        | fs i =>
          specialize hfg (.fs i) j
          simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim
      refine ⟨u, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => Coalg.toCofix { a with s := x }) ⊚ (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.getLeft!) ⊚ f
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => Coalg.toCofix { b with s := x }) ⊚ (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.getRight!) ⊚ g
      · simp only [← hf, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        congr 1
        funext x
        cases x <;> rfl
      · simp only [← hg, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        congr 1
        funext x
        cases x <;> rfl
      · intro i j
        cases i
        · exact hfg _ j
        · simp only [TypeVec.comp, Function.comp_apply, TypeVec.appendFun]
          specialize hfg (Fin2.fz) j
          simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, RelLast] at hfg
          cases hfj : f Fin2.fz j <;> cases hgj : g Fin2.fz j <;> simp_all
          refine ⟨_, _, hfg, rfl, rfl⟩

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim
      refine ⟨u, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => Cofix.corec a.dest' s) ⊚ f
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun t => Cofix.corec b.dest' t) ⊚ g
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        convert hf using 2
        funext i x
        cases i <;> rfl
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        convert hg using 2
        funext i x
        cases i <;> rfl
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.IsRelLast] at hfg ⊢
          specialize hfg Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.IsRelLast, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun] at hfg ⊢
          obtain ⟨s', t', hR', hs', ht'⟩ := hfg
          cases s' with
          | inl s' =>
            cases t' with
            | inl => simp only [RelLast] at hR'
            | inr t' =>
              refine ⟨s', t', hR', ?_, ?_⟩
              · simp only [TypeVec.comp] at hs' ⊢; exact hs'
              · simp only [TypeVec.comp] at ht' ⊢; exact ht'
          | inr =>
            cases t' with
            | inl => simp only [RelLast] at hR'
            | inr => simp only [RelLast] at hR'
        | fs i =>
          specialize hfg (.fs i) j
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.id] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg

have h := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest'] at h
      rw [Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec]
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at hf
        convert hf using 2
        ext i x
        cases i <;> rfl
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at hg
        convert hg using 2
        ext i x
        cases i <;> rfl
      · intro i j
        specialize hfg i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at hfg ⊢
          obtain ⟨s', t', hR', hs', ht'⟩ := hfg
          cases hs'
          cases ht'
          exact ⟨s', t', hR', rfl, rfl⟩
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg

have h_lift := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at h_lift
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, h_rel⟩ := h_lift
      use u
      use (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => Coalg.toCofix { a with s := x }) ⊚ f
      use (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => Coalg.toCofix { b with s := x }) ⊚ g
      refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
        rw [← hf]
        simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        rfl
      · simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
        rw [← hg]
        simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        rfl
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz]
          specialize h_rel Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz, RelLast, 
                     TypeVec.repeatEq, Fin2.lastCases_last] at h_rel ⊢
          obtain ⟨s', t', hR', hs', ht'⟩ := h_rel
          cases hs'
          cases ht'
          exact ⟨s', t', hR', rfl, rfl⟩
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fs, TypeVec.id]
          specialize h_rel (.fs i) j
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fs, TypeVec.id, 
                     RelLast, TypeVec.repeatEq, Fin2.lastCases_fz] at h_rel
          exact h_rel

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have h_lift := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at h_lift
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_lift
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hf]
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hg]
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at hfg ⊢
          specialize hfg Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun] at hfg
          cases (f Fin2.fz j) with
          | inl s' =>
            cases (g Fin2.fz j) with
            | inl t' => exact False.elim hfg
            | inr t' =>
              refine ⟨s', t', hfg, rfl, rfl⟩
          | inr s' =>
            cases (g Fin2.fz j) with
            | inl t' => exact False.elim hfg
            | inr t' => exact False.elim hfg
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg (Fin2.fs i) j

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have h_bisim' := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at h_bisim'
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim' ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim'
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc, hf]
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc, hg]
      · intro i x
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.elim0] at hfg ⊢
          specialize hfg Fin2.fz x
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun] at hfg
          obtain ⟨s', t', hR', hs', ht'⟩ := hfg
          cases hR' with
          | inl h => exact ⟨s', t', h, hs', ht'⟩
          | inr h => exact ⟨s', t', h, hs', ht'⟩
        | fs i =>
          specialize hfg i.fs x
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.id] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hf]
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hg]
      · intro i j
        specialize hfg i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at hfg ⊢
          obtain ⟨s', t', hR', rfl, rfl⟩ := hfg
          exact ⟨s', t', hR', rfl, rfl⟩
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun] at hfg ⊢
          exact hfg

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have h := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at h
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, rel⟩ := h
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [← MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hf]
      · simp only [← MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hg]
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.IsLast, TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at rel ⊢
          specialize rel Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.IsLast, TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at rel
          obtain ⟨s', t', hR', hs', ht'⟩ := rel
          cases hs'
          cases ht'
          exact ⟨s', t', hR', rfl, rfl⟩
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun]
          specialize rel i.fs j
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun] at rel
          exact rel

simp only [Coalg.toCofix]
      rw [Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest'] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim
      refine ⟨u, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => Coalg.toCofix { a with s := x }) ⊚ 
              (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => match x with | .inl s => s | .inr _ => a.s) ⊚ f
      · exact (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => Coalg.toCofix { b with s := x }) ⊚ 
              (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => match x with | .inl _ => b.s | .inr s => s) ⊚ g
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc] at hf ⊢
        convert hf using 2
        funext i x
        fin_cases i <;> rfl
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc] at hg ⊢
        convert hg using 2
        funext i x
        fin_cases i <;> rfl
      · intro i x
        specialize hfg i x
        fin_cases i
        · exact hfg
        · simp only [TypeVec.comp] at hfg ⊢
          obtain ⟨sl, hl⟩ | ⟨sr, hr⟩ := hfg
          · simp only [hl]
            refine ⟨sl, ?_, rfl, rfl⟩
            convert hR
          · simp only [hr]
            refine ⟨sr, ?_, rfl, rfl⟩
            convert hR

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have h := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at h
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [← hf, TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, ← MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp]
        rfl
      · simp only [← hg, TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, ← MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp]
        rfl
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.IsLast, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz]
          refine ⟨f Fin2.fz j, g Fin2.fz j, ?_, rfl, rfl⟩
          have := hfg Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz] at this
          exact this
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fs]
          have := hfg i.fs j
          simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fs, TypeVec.id] at this
          exact this

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      obtain ⟨u, f, g, hf, hg, hfg⟩ := h_bisim
      refine ⟨u, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec a.dest') ⊚ f, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec b.dest') ⊚ g, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hf]
      · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, hg]
      · intro i j
        cases i with
        | fz =>
          simp only [TypeVec.IsLast] at hfg
          specialize hfg Fin2.fz j
          simp only [TypeVec.IsLast, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun] at hfg ⊢
          cases (f Fin2.fz j) with
          | inl s' =>
            cases (g Fin2.fz j) with
            | inl => simp at hfg
            | inr t' =>
              simp only [Function.comp_apply, Sum.inl.injEq, Sum.inr.injEq] at hfg ⊢
              exact ⟨s', t', hfg, rfl, rfl⟩
          | inr =>
            cases (g Fin2.fz j) with
            | inl => simp at hfg
            | inr => simp at hfg
        | fs i =>
          simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.id_apply]
          exact hfg (Fin2.fs i) j
